The Football Transfer Sources Reliability Guide

Football Transfer Source Reliability Tiers

Tier 1 – Almost undisputed when discussing a Transfer Rumour. They may not be the first to discuss a rumour, but if they are talking about it; then it is almost certainly true, and possibly close to complete.
Tier 2 – Known to have current sources, but are still fallible and just short of being considered an authority on rumour discussions. However, multiple individuals or sources from this tier reporting the same rumour may indicate a strong possibility of truth to the rumour.
Tier 3 – Unreliable, and not to be trusted solo. They fall into near click-bait practices and are often fighting for relevance in a sea of rumours.
Tier 4 – Not to be trusted at all. These companies make money out of ensuring that you read them and they will make up anything to get you to harness advertising revenue.
Tier 5 – Don’t waste your time reading them

With five days remaining until the end of the transfer window, Torino are looking to bring in reinforcement to Giampaolo's squad. The Granata, after submitting a bid to Lyon for Andersen, have targeted Rennes striker M'Baye Niang.

The Senegalese, who left Torino on a permanent deal in 2019 to join the French side for €15 million, could return to the Granara where he made 29 apperances scoring four goals and providing three assists.

Torino have also made an offer to Bournemouth for Norwegian striker Joshua King. However, the player is still uncertain about potentially joining the Granata.

在轉會談判官迪克羅爾為阿仙奴工作的最後一個球季裏，他努力地談判湯馬士利馬的交易，那是一場折騰了整個夏天的肥皂劇。阿仙奴從六月起就開始談判，但由於摩納哥要價過高，雙方一直沒法達成共識。在距離轉會窗關閉還有兩天時，迪克羅爾接到摩納哥行政總裁華斯利耶夫的電話，他要求阿仙奴作出最後決定。

　　於是迪克羅爾與雲加及首席執行官加薛迪斯展開了會談，他們決定推動阿歷西斯山齊士加盟曼城，從而獲得資金將湯馬士利馬帶到北倫敦。但這個方案的問題在於時間，由於湯馬士利馬被召入了法國國家隊，他需要在當晚參加對荷蘭的世界盃外圍賽。

　　「當我們接觸到湯馬士利馬本人的時候，已經是下午三時了，他表示自己壓力太大，只想馬上回到摩納哥休息。」儘管當時阿仙奴已經和湯馬士利馬談妥了個人條約，甚至願意提高報價，但湯馬士利馬表示自己需要更多的時間來考慮自己是否要轉會，而時間正是阿仙奴所急缺的。

　　迪克羅爾表示，雖然阿仙奴想盡快簽入湯馬士利馬，並在最後一日向摩納哥開出一億歐元求購，但阿歷西斯山齊士竟然無人問津，令兩名球員都無法轉會：「我們一直都收不到對阿歷西斯山齊士的正式報價，直到曼城在最後一天出現。」

　　曼城在壓線日向阿仙奴開出了六千萬鎊的報價，但由於擔心沒有時間完成湯馬士利馬的轉會，阿仙奴最終拒絕了曼城。迪克羅爾表示：「如果想爭逐歐聯席位，留下還是賣走阿歷西斯山齊士會對我們更有利？」

　　最終雙方都沒有轉會離隊，阿歷西斯山齊士在半季後加盟曼聯，阿仙奴換來亞美尼亞中場米希達利恩作為替補；而湯馬士利馬則在二零一八年夏季，以七千二百萬歐元天價加盟馬德里體育會。

Angers to land Sofiane Boufal from Southampton

L’Équipe and Foot Mercato report that Angers are poised to land Moroccan international Sofiane Boufal from Southampton in the final hours of this window.

It is a big deal for Le SCO, who are going to see the return of the 27-year-old, who first flourished under their roof.

Boufal has been convinced by Stéphane Moulin to make the move – this, despite the fact that Olympiakos and Real Betis have shown interest, and the forward has received very lucrative proposals from Chinese and Saudi Arabian outfits.

Angers have offered him a long-term contract, which he accepted last night. Besiktas were ready to outbid the French club in the last minute, but the Ligue 1 club have agreed a fee with the Saints.

Barring a major u-turn, Boufal is expected to become an Angers player in the coming 36 hours.
